testsuite.name: dev.angzarr.examples.CucumberAcceptanceTest

testcase.name: Poker Game Flow - Register player and deposit funds
testcase.failure: dev.angzarr.client.Errors$GrpcError: UNAVAILABLE: io exception at app//dev.angzarr.client.CommandHandlerClient.handleCommand(CommandHandlerClient.java:145) at app//dev.angzarr.examples.client.GrpcCommandClient.sendCommand(GrpcCommandClient.java:47) at app//dev.angzarr.examples.client.TestContext.sendCommand(TestContext.java:106) at app//dev.angzarr.examples.acceptance.AcceptancePlayerSteps.registerPlayer(AcceptancePlayerSteps.java:39) at ✽.I register player "Alice" with email "alice@example.com"(classpath:features/acceptance/poker_game.feature:41)
